programme.title: Thirai Thendral
programme.desc: The host interacts with the viewers and plays Tamil movie songs upon request.

programme.title: Sugamana Ragangal
programme.desc: This program features a soothing collection of melodious Tamil songs.

programme.title: Bakthi Paadalgal
programme.desc: This program plays a special collection of devotional songs for a spiritual morning.

programme.title: Aalaya Vazhipaadu
programme.desc: Aalaya Vazhipaadu is a spiritual show that features devotional songs and worships in divine temples on auspicious occasions. It enlightens  the viewers on the history of the sacred shrines around our city, state and across the country.

programme.title: Aanmeega Kadhaigal
programme.desc: This spiritual show features the divine discourse of poet Andal Priyadarshini. Listen to her share and summarize on ancient Tamil literature of Siddhars, the mystic philosophers who had attained spiritual powers.

programme.title: Nalla Kaalam Pirakkuthu
programme.desc: An astrology show to know what the stars have in store for you today. It features the daily astrology predictions based on the 27 nakshatras, pertaining to the 12 zodiac signs.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: This program chronicles the latest events, developments, inventions, discoveries and happenings around the world.

programme.title: Vanakkam Thamizha
programme.desc: It's a morning talk show which hosts celebrities & professionals from all walks of life who share their valuable expertise on varied topics. Enjoy a delightful start to your day with a healthy dose of information and entertainment.

programme.title: Ethirneechal
programme.desc: Urged by her father, Janani is always a high achiever. But her marriage into a patriarchal family dashes her dream of a career. Thus begins Janani's arduous journey towards empowering her family's oppressed women to unleash their power.

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father & coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to become her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother & sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Vinodhini
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love.

programme.title: Puthu Vasantham
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family

programme.title: Aadukalam
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Enna Petha Rasa
programme.desc: Lakshmi and Raja fall in love and decide to get married. But on the day of the marriage, Raja is accused of murdering a woman.

programme.desc: Separated at birth, twins Kavin and Nila unknowingly meet at school, setting off truths that force their estranged parents, Vijayalakshmi and Vikram, to confront their forbidden marriage and the painful past that tore their family apart.

programme.title: Annam
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Annam, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Kayal
programme.desc: Abandoned by her father & coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to become her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother & sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Moondru Mudichu
programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.title: Singapenne
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Anandhi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Ethirneechal Thodargiradhu

programme.title: Puthu Vasantham
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family

programme.title: Movie Contd - Ramachandra
programme.desc: Due To His Honesty And Refusal To Meet The Demands Of Those In Power, Inspector Ramachandran Is Often Transferred From One Town To Another. Soon, He Finds Himself In An Area That Is Highly Terrorised.

programme.title: Ullam
programme.desc: Raja, an introvert, falls in love with Kavitha, who helped him to become an extrovert. Things turn chaotic when Raja comes to know about Kavitha's dark past.

programme.title: Unarchigal
programme.desc: Amruta's father struggles to find a suitable match for her, which is tough because of an astrological flaw in her zodiac. When she finally gets married, the groom steals her jewelry and abandons her on the first night.

programme.title: Uttama Purushan
programme.desc: Raghu, a married man, tries to have an extra marital affair with his secretary and asks her to come to a hotel room. However, he gets accused of murdering a woman, who stayed in the neighboring room.

programme.title: Gokulam
programme.desc: Chellappa, who owns a photo studio, falls in love with Mary, who has recently come to stay in his locality. His dreams shatter when she reveals the secrets of her past.

programme.title: Thaai Veedu
programme.desc: A rich man owns an antique sword which is the family's heirloom; another man makes several unsuccessful attempts to steal this. He then employs the rich man's long lost sun to steal it, but the truth is revealed in time.

programme.title: Rojavanam
programme.desc: Muthu, an orphan, works at an old age home and loves Roja, the daughter of the owner. But she is in a dilemma as she has to marry the son of her father's friend to save the home.

programme.title: Priyamaana Thozhi
programme.desc: Ashok and Julie are childhood friends. Julie is set to marry Michael, a cricketer who is hoping to get selected in the Indian team, but her wedding plans are threatened when Ashok is selected instead.

programme.title: Achchamundu Achchamundu
programme.desc: Senthil and Malini live a content life in New Jersey with their ten-year-old daughter Rithika. However, trouble begins to brew when Robertson, a child predator, comes to paint their basement.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Achchamundu Achchamundu
programme.desc: Senthil and Malini live a content life in New Jersey with their ten-year-old daughter Rithika. However, trouble begins to brew when Robertson, a child predator, comes to paint their basement.

programme.title: Urchagam
programme.desc: Jency and Ganesh love each other, but she has to get married to Nicholas, a rich entrepreneur from London. He had financed her mother's surgery, so in gratitude, Jency agrees to marry him.

programme.title: Uthami
programme.desc: Uthami is a 1985 Indian Tamil-language film directed by M. Vellaichami, starring Sujatha, Rajesh and Sangeeta

programme.title: Vaidegi Kathirunthal
programme.desc: When Vaidehi and Vellaisamy meet, their lives undergo a drastic turn. They discover that they must join forces to save a young couple from the wrath of the villagers.

programme.title: Chirai Chaalai
programme.desc: In 1915 British India, Indian doctor Govardhan is falsely accused of bombing a train and sent to a cellular jail at Port Blair. He witnesses the extremely inhumane treatment meted out to the inmates.

programme.title: Sigappu Rojakkal
programme.desc: Finding it hard to put his dark past behind him, Samar grows to despise girls and indulges in women trafficking. Arrested and put in an asylum by the police, he falls for a demented lady prisoner.

programme.title: Sollamale
programme.desc: Shwetha, a rich and kind woman, assumes that Nadaraj cannot speak and shows empathy towards him. When their friendship blossoms into love, Nadaraj faces an arduous task of proving his love.

programme.title: Pithamagan
programme.desc: A young orphan grows up in a graveyard and is devoid of any human feelings; when he leaves the cemetery and meets people, he experiences emotions for the first time.

programme.title: Un Samayal Arayil
programme.desc: Kalidasan and Gowri are food lovers who get connected over a wrong phone call. Gradually, they develop feelings for each other but hide their true identities during their face-to-face meeting.

programme.title: Uyirthiru 420
programme.desc: A conman falls for the girl he was deceiving and decides to work as an honest man. While working in a hotel, he discovers that his boss is being troubled by a high profile man and plans to help him by conning the man.

programme.title: Vadugapatti Mapillai
programme.desc: When Vadivu's city-based fiance, Vijay, refuses to marry her for her simple looks, her father swears that he'll get them married anyhow. She then changes into the avatar of Jeena and enters his life.

programme.title: Kaadhal Parisu
programme.desc: Sisters Malini and Chitra are heirs to a huge fortune. Chitra is in for a shock when she introduces her boyfriend to Malini and the latter accuses him of raping her years ago.

programme.title: Taj Mahal
programme.desc: A man sees a woman on her engagement day and they fall for each other. Later, her engagement is broken off due to some circumstances but, the enmity between their villages and family acts as a barrier to their budding relationship.

programme.title: Gopurangal Saivathillai
programme.desc: Mohan is forced to marry Arukkani, an illiterate village girl. Disappointed, he develops a secret relationship with a modern girl. But problems follow when he repents.

programme.title: Veera Thalattu
programme.desc: Pandi is a villager who loves his mother beyond words. However, Pandi gets shocked when his uncle reveals that she is not his mother. What happens when Pandi's real mother returns to the village?

programme.title: Mayie
programme.desc: A man is always protective of the women in his village. One day, he learns that his father has a second wife and gets upset at him. After his father commits suicide, he brings home his stepsister.

programme.title: Aravaan
programme.desc: Kombodhi is the leader of a tribe, who steals from the rich to survive. He befriends Varupuli, who unknown to Kombodhi is a man who escaped from being sacrificed and is being hunted by his village.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Ramachandra
programme.desc: Due To His Honesty And Refusal To Meet The Demands Of Those In Power, Inspector Ramachandran Is Often Transferred From One Town To Another. Soon, He Finds Himself In An Area That Is Highly Terrorised.

programme.title: Guru
programme.desc: A few political goons, disguised as Muslims, cause trouble at the temple and kill Raghuraman's family. Later, Raghuraman joins an extremist group and decides to avenge his family's death.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Rathasapthami
programme.desc: Sapthami's selfless nature often leads her into trouble, while Sreemanth's self-serving actions strain his ties with his own family. Their contrasting worlds collide when destiny takes their paths from conflict to togetherness.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Kulla Agent 000
programme.desc: Since Kulla has a short stature, he is considered to be unfit for becoming a secret agent. However, he gets ecstatic when the opportunity arises and he gets the chance to fulfil his dream.

programme.title: Dari Tappida Maga
programme.desc: Two estranged brothers, who could not be more different from one another, choose different paths in life and are eventually reunited by an unexpected twist of fate.

programme.title: Mathe Hadithu Kogile
programme.desc: Sangeeta, who loves singer Anand, is forced to marry Kumar, her father's business partner. Post marriage, Sangeeta dies during childbirth, leaving behind a child that biologically belongs to Anand.

programme.title: Vishnuvardhana
programme.desc: A man wishes to accomplish great things and become very rich without having to work hard. However, he finds himself in hilariously puzzling situations when he comes across a gangster's phone.

programme.title: Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara
programme.desc: Three friends grow up to be successful professionals. Although they do not stay in touch over the years, they eventually reunite for a common cause.

programme.title: Bombat Robo
programme.desc: Vaseegaran, a brilliant scientist, builds Chitti, a unique robot, who is programmed to protect mankind and also feel human emotions. Problems arise when Chitti falls in love with his girlfriend.

programme.title: Bhale Adrushtavo Adrushta
programme.desc: Movie starring Kalpana, B V Radha, Gangadhar, Srinath and directed by K S L Swamy.

programme.title: Yahoo
programme.desc: Yahoo is a kannada movie directed by Seetharam Karanth starring Sourav and Neetha in the lead roles

programme.title: Prem Kahani
programme.desc: Sandhya, a girl who belongs to a wealthy family, falls for a man named Manja, who does manual labour to earn a living. However, Sandhya's life changes when she is forced to marry Rajesh, a builder.

programme.title: Movie -Varada
programme.desc: Varada grows up with his mother as his father is getting married to another woman. Hence he develops hatred towards his father and starts punishing the people who go for a second marriage and extra-marital affair.

programme.title: Appu and Pappu
programme.desc: Young Appu's best friend is his faithful orangutan, Pappu. Among their daily antics, they also get an opportunity to fight the criminals who have stolen a crucial missile technology plan.

programme.title: Krishnan Love Story
programme.desc: Geeta, who likes Krishna, decides to elope with Narendra because of his wealth. However, things take a turn when Narendra dies in an accident.

programme.title: Mandyada Gandu
programme.desc: Krishna, a simple man, is cheated and humiliated by the village head, Kempe Gowda, and his daughter, Radha. To seek revenge, Krishna disguises himself and devises a plan to teach them a lesson.

programme.title: Karna
programme.desc: Karna, an unemployed graduate, is always at fault for everything he does. Karna tries to win his father's heart, but circumstances turn against him.

programme.title: Dweepa
programme.desc: Nagi is the pillar of her small family that includes her husband and her rigid father-in-law. Faced with the possibility of losing her home due to the construction of a dam, Nagi proves her strength.

programme.title: Hello Daddy
programme.desc: Prakash, a widower, is a government official responsible for confiscating lands acquired by criminals illegally. His son wants him to get a life and tries to find a suitor.

programme.title: Bangarada Kalasa
programme.desc: Nagraj, an orphan raised by a poor woman, grows up to become the protector of his village. Nagaraj's life changes when he meets Uma, the new teacher in the village.

programme.title: Taj Mahal
programme.desc: Ajay is madly in love with Shruti and confesses his love for her but Shruti is in love with Kumar who is none other than Ajay who had helped her father trace a valuable suitcase.

programme.title: Excuse Me
programme.desc: Ajay, a musician, and his Casanova friend Sunil move to Bengaluru with different goals. Soon, Sunil pretends to be Ajay in order to impress Madhu, a girl who is passionate about music.

programme.title: Dance Raja Dance
programme.desc: Raja, a dancer, vows to take revenge on a rich man for killing his father. He falls in love with Radha, but little does he know that she is the daughter of the man who killed his father.

programme.title: Kesarina Kamala
programme.desc: Movie starring Shrungar Nagaraj, Surekha, Kalpana and Uma Shivakumar and is directed by R N Jayagopal.

programme.title: Brahma Gantu
programme.desc: Muniyamma gets married to Murali, who hates her. Post marriage he falls in love with Julie and gets married to her. He brings Muniyamma to Julie's house and introduces her as a maid.

programme.title: Aryan
programme.desc: Aryan, a successful athlete-turned-coach, takes Shwetha under his wing, and moulds her into an ace athlete. However, things take a turn when she becomes successful.

programme.title: Thavarina Thottilu
programme.desc: Thimanna, a conniving man, gets his son, Bhaskar, married to Sarsu, the sister of a rich landlord. Soon, Thimanna starts taking money from Sarsu by lying, but fate punishes his family in a harsh way.

programme.title: Nee Bareda Kadambari
programme.desc: A couple get married to each other despite the initial disapproval of her parents. However, the woman's father, creates troubles and tries to separate them.

programme.title: Shabarimale Swamy Ayyappa
programme.desc: The childless king Rajasekhara Pandiyan finds an abandoned child in the forest and adopts him. The child grows up as a prince and is sent on a dangerous mission into the same forest.

programme.title: Ravivarma
programme.desc: Ravivarma is an artist with a special talent. His life turns upside down when he helps a police officer trace a notorious criminal through his artistic skills.

programme.title: Mantra Saara
programme.desc: This program features various hymns showcasing several temples and their deities.

programme.desc: A compilation of the most commercially successful songs from recent Kannada movies.

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.
